description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a medium-height, gently contoured backrest and a wide, cushioned seat, both upholstered in a brown fabric with a subtle diamond-stitched pattern. The chair sits atop a black, five-pointed star-shaped metal base equipped with five small casters for mobility. The seat and backrest are smoothly integrated, lacking any visible armrests, and the upholstery appears plush and comfortable. The central support column is cylindrical and black, likely made of metal, connecting the seat to the base and possibly containing a height adjustment mechanism. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for office or home use, with a focus on comfort and maneuverability. The chair's neutral brown and black color scheme allows it to blend seamlessly into various urban environments.
description: A brown, diamond-stitched swivel chair with a cushioned seat and backrest, mounted on a black five-caster metal base. It has a modern, armless design and is upholstered in soft fabric.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat and backrest, highlighting the diamond-stitched brown upholstery and the absence of armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the chair's profile, showing the gentle backward angle of the backrest and the thickness of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, rectangular back of the chair and the symmetrical five-caster base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the seat's contour and the sturdy central support column.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, cylindrical metal column connecting the seat to the five-pointed base, likely telescoping for height adjustment.
attribute_seat_back_design: Medium-height, rectangular backrest with gentle contouring, upholstered in brown fabric with a diamond-stitched pattern and no cutouts.
